transcript: Wh... now, what are you gonna bring?
I'm gonna bring your spleen to ya.
Spleen. Mmhmm. That's right. What's the best time of day on that, madam?
[in background] You got the wrong number...
[in background, laughing] It's a prank, dude! Hang up the phone... [indiscernible]
Listen to me now, I don't know what games you kids are playing, but you need to listen up.
You need to listen up right now.
What's the best time to bring your spleen to ya?
What's the best time to bring your bladder on down, partner?
What you got going on over there? Damn, uh... rodeo, or somethin'?
Put your old man on the line, would ya? Appreciate that.
That's not important right now, okay. Why don't you go on and fetch him? Appreciate it.
What are you "damn" bringing, a bladder?
[to someone in background] He says he's "damn" bringing a bladder... [indiscernible]
Yeah, what's the best time of day to bring your spleen to ya, partner?
Yeah, partner... what's the best time of day to deliver your spleen to ya?
What's the best time to ship it? Aw-haw-haw-haw-haw-haw-haw!
You need a room? This is a motel.
